subject: Goggles of Night
fact: Daein purchased the Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces before descending into the Underdark.
source_quote: purchased by Daein for two hundred gold pieces before descending into the Underdark

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: The Goggles of Night grant the wearer darkvision.
source_quote: The goggles grant the wearer darkvision

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: Daein's Mandolin is a magical musical instrument used to cast spells.
source_quote: A magical musical instrument used by Daein to cast spells

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: The Mandolin can grant the Fly spell to a creature.
source_quote: It can grant the Fly spell to a creature

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: The Mandolin cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn.
source_quote: cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn

subject: flight grant
fact: Daein used the Mandolin to grant himself flight.
source_quote: Daein used it to grant himself flight

subject: party transfer
fact: Daein relied on his own powers to transfer the rest of the party across dangerous terrain.
source_quote: relied on his own powers to transfer the rest of the party across dangerous terrain

subject: Catapult spell cast
fact: Felkur cast the Catapult spell against one of the mutated fire giants during the ambush.
source_quote: A spell cast by Felkur against one of the mutated fire giants during the ambush

subject: Catapult damage
fact: The Catapult spell dealt only four points of damage to the giant.
source_quote: dealing only four points of damage to the giant

subject: Protective Field activation
fact: Daein used the Protective Field ability to protect Bramgrim from the fire giant's attacks.
source_quote: used by Daein to protect Bramgrim from the fire giant's devastating attacks

subject: Protective Field effect
fact: The Protective Field reduces incoming damage by four points.
source_quote: it reduces incoming damage by four points

subject: Bramgrim knocked unconscious
fact: A fire giant's critical hit knocked Bramgrim unconscious.
source_quote: knocked Bramgrim unconscious

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim cast the Spirit Guardians spell at fifth level during the fire giant encounter.
source_quote: A powerful spell cast by Bramgrim at fifth level during the fire giant encounter

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: Spirit Guardians creates a radiant aura with a fifteen-foot radius that harms enemies and halves their movement speed.
source_quote: creates a radiant aura with a fifteen-foot radius around the caster that harms enemies and halves their movement speed

subject: Bramgrim positioning
fact: Bramgrim positioned himself to affect both giants before being knocked unconscious.
source_quote: Bramgrim positioned himself strategically to affect both giants before being knocked unconscious

subject: Pass Without Trace cast
fact: Akritas cast the Pass Without Trace spell multiple times throughout the journey.
source_quote: cast by Akritas multiple times throughout the journey

subject: Pass Without Trace bonus
fact: Pass Without Trace grants a plus ten bonus to Stealth checks for the entire party.
source_quote: grants a plus ten bonus to Stealth checks for the entire party

subject: sneaking past giants
fact: The party successfully sneaked past the fire giants after their initial defeat using Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: allowing them to successfully sneak past the fire giants after their initial defeat

subject: evading cloakers
fact: The party evaded the cloakers in the narrow tunnel using Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: later evade the cloakers in the narrow tunnel

subject: Fly spell cast
fact: Daein cast the Fly spell using his magical mandolin.
source_quote: A spell cast by Daein using his magical mandolin

subject: Fly spell duration
fact: The Fly spell has a duration of one hour and requires concentration.
source_quote: granting flight with a duration of one hour and requiring concentration

subject: Daein scouting
fact: Daein used the Fly spell on himself to scout ahead.
source_quote: Daein used it on himself to scout ahead

subject: obstacle navigation
fact: Daein navigated dangerous terrain including deep pits and the underground river.
source_quote: navigate dangerous terrain including deep pits and the underground river

subject: mutated fire giants
fact: Mutated fire giants ambushed the party.
source_quote: mutated fire giants during the ambush

subject: Cave Creeper fungi
fact: The underground river is filled with Cave Creeper fungi.
source_quote: underground river filled with Cave Creeper fungi

subject: cloakers
fact: Cloakers were encountered in a narrow tunnel.
source_quote: evade the cloakers in the narrow tunnel
